problem: What synthetic material perfectly mimics bone's mechanical and biological properties?
mechanism: Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko)
hypothesis: Combining Biomimetic surface structure (lotus, shark skin, gecko) with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 13 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
